title: Machine Learning Engineer, Search and Recommendations
description: Build ranking, retrieval, and recommendation systems for a marketplace product. The role emphasizes production ML, backend services, experimentation, and cross-functional product engineering.

title: Software Engineer, Data Platform
description: Design and operate backend systems that process high-volume observability data. The role is coding-heavy and focused on distributed systems, reliability, and data infrastructure.

title: Forward Deployed AI Engineer, Generative AI
description: Work with strategic customers to prototype and deploy generative AI solutions. The role includes coding and architecture, but has significant customer-facing delivery responsibilities.

title: Backend Software Engineer, Payments Platform
description: Develop backend services for payments and financial product systems. The role appears coding-heavy and product-facing, but no agent review has been imported yet.

title: Solutions Architect, AI/ML
description: Advise customers on cloud architecture and AI/ML services. The role is technically deep but primarily customer-facing and advisory rather than long-term product engineering.

title: Backend Engineer, Simulation Platform
description: Build backend services and internal platforms for simulation workflows. The role appears aligned but disappeared from the latest demo scan.
